style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, drawn as a snakes-and-ladders board laid out as a single climbing path of eight labelled squares in order: EXIGENCES, PLANIFICATION, ARCHITECTURE, PROTOTYPAGE, DÉVELOPPEMENT, TESTS UTILISATEURS, ACCEPTATION PAR L'UTILISATEUR, DÉPLOIEMENT. A couple of small navy ladders rise forward between squares, captioned POINTS VERS L'AVANT. One rust snake slides from a late square back to an earlier one, captioned RENVOYÉ EN ARRIÈRE, COÛTE PLUS CHER À MESURE QU'IL RECULE. A single small token sits mid-board. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
